title: planchonella skottsbergii
intro: Planchonella skottsbergii is a species of plant in the family Sapotaceae, commonly known as the guanabani or white sapote. Native to the Pacific island of Easter Island, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The extracts of Planchonella skottsbergii have shown potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, wounds, and infections. Herbal preparations of Planchonella skottsbergii can be made into teas, infusions, and topical creams, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized for therapeutic purposes.
